description.ko: 현실의 경계가 옅어지고 공허가 숨겨진 빛의 비밀을 드러내는, 고요하고 장엄한 우주 심연을 탐험하세요.
description.en: Explore the silent majesty of the cosmic deep, where the fabric of reality thins and the void reveals its hidden, luminous secrets.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot, cosmic deep void, swirling dark nebula with bioluminescent teal and violet highlights, distant collapsing stars, infinite abyss, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, ethereal atmosphere, sense of scale, dark celestial aesthetic, VOID-3 style.
